meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.3+§7.5 + reference impl #333] 縦中横 with a NON-adjacent referent: ３３ occurs in the same plain run before the directive (明治３３年…, 年 intervenes). Per §7.5 the most-recent plain occurrence inside the run is styled in place — the parser splices a detached decoration at ３３ (the combine-upright span) while the directive bracket stays a forward reference that renders nothing, so ３３ appears exactly once, now styled (the reference-impl #228 no-double-render invariant holds). serialize re-emits the bracket form unchanged. Complements the recovery case (vector tate_chu_yoko) where the target is absent and tcy-target-not-found is raised. Offsets from the §3 byte model.
